ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the cases are reported */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease (e.g., COVID-19, Influenza) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_cases_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the vaccinations are reported */,
  "total_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccines administered */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Total number of first doses given */,
  "second_dose" INTEGER /* Total number of second doses given */,
  "booster_dose" INTEGER /* Total number of booster doses given */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination report */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the hospital is located */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total bed capacity of the hospital */,
  "current_patients" INTEGER /* Current number of patients in the hospital */,
  "icu_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ICU capacity of the hospital */,
  "current_icu_patients" INTEGER /* Current number of patients in ICU */,
  "ventilator_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ventilator capacity of the hospital */,
  "current_ventilator_patients" INTEGER /* Current number of patients using ventilators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, epidemiologist) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the user is associated with */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_tracing" (
  "trace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracing record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being traced */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact person */,
  "date_contacted" TEXT /* Date when the contact was made */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the case and the contact (e.g., family, friend, colleague) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_tracing_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES disease_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., hospital, public health department) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being tracked */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases on the recorded date */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the recorded date */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the recorded date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on the recorded date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_distribution" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital receiving the resources */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., PPE, ventilators) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of distribution */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_distribution_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospital_data ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource request */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital making the request */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource requested */,
  "requested_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of resource requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_requests_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospital_data ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_advisories" (
  "advisory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisory */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the advisory applies */,
  "advisory_text" TEXT /* Text of the health advisory */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the advisory was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the advisory expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_advisories_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the patient is associated with */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the patient (e.g., active, recovered, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES disease_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_administration" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the vaccine */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date when the vaccine was administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (e.g., 1, 2, booster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_administration_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_data ("patient_id")
)
